# My Project Constitution

## Core Principles

### Code Quality

All code must follow our quality standards and pass automated checks.

### Security

Security is a first-class concern in all development activities.

## Performance

All API endpoints must respond within 200ms at p95.

**Version**: 1.3.0 | **Ratified**: 2026-03-11 | **Last Amended**: 2026-04-14
